products.title: Lenovo LOQ Ryzen 5 7235HS RTX 4050 Gaming Laptop (16GB RAM, 512GB SSD)
products.short_description: Lenovo LOQ gaming laptop powered by Ryzen 5 7235HS and RTX 4050 delivers strong gaming performance, 144Hz display, and smooth multitasking with 16GB RAM.
products.long_description:
The Lenovo LOQ is a mid-range gaming laptop designed for gamers, creators, and power users who want strong GPU performance at a competitive price.

It is powered by the AMD Ryzen 5 7235HS processor paired with NVIDIA RTX 4050 6GB GPU, delivering smooth performance in modern AAA games, video editing, and heavy multitasking.

The 15.6-inch Full HD IPS display with 144Hz refresh rate ensures fluid visuals and responsive gameplay. With 16GB DDR5 RAM and 512GB SSD storage, the system is fast, stable, and capable of handling demanding workloads.

Lenovo’s advanced cooling system with dual fans and AI Engine+ helps maintain performance during long gaming sessions while reducing overheating.

However, battery life is limited when unplugged, and the device is relatively heavy for portability. Overall, it is a strong value-for-money gaming laptop in the mid-range segment.
highlights: Advanced dual-fan cooling system with AI Engine+
pros: Great value in mid-range gaming segment
cons: Battery life is poor on unplugged use
Can heat under heavy gaming load

positive: Great performance for gaming and editing
negative: Some units reported minor hardware issues

seo.meta_description: Buy Lenovo LOQ Ryzen 5 7235HS RTX 4050 gaming laptop with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD. Best budget gaming laptop in India 2026.
